Trust & Compliance

Transparent policies, safe products, and responsible operations

Our Commitment

Quality & Safety Standards

Farm-to-Pack Control

Our team manages cultivation, leaf collection, drying, and packaging with documented handling practices.

Clean Processing

Moringa leaves are processed on-site with hygiene controls and sealed packaging to preserve freshness.

Traceable Origin

Products are sourced from our farm in Shreenathkot, Gorkha, Nepal with clear origin communication.

Customer Policies

Shipping, Returns, and Support

Shipping Policy

Orders are confirmed through WhatsApp or direct contact. Dispatch timelines and delivery estimates are shared before payment confirmation.

Returns & Refunds

If your order arrives damaged or incorrect, contact us within 48 hours with order details and photos for resolution.

Customer Support

For product guidance, order tracking, and bulk inquiries, reach us via email, phone, or WhatsApp listed below.

Legal & Data

Privacy and Terms

Privacy Notice

We use contact details only for responding to inquiries and order communication. We do not sell customer data to third parties.

Terms of Service

Product details, prices, and availability may change. Final order confirmation is provided at the point of direct customer communication.

Health Disclaimer

Our products are food supplements and not medical treatments. Consult a professional for medical or dietary concerns.

Need More Information?
